javax.swing.plaf.multi/MultiLookAndFeel/.name: uisToArray
signatures: public protected static ComponentUI[] uisToArray(Vector<? extends ComponentUI> uis)
javax.swing.plaf.multi/MultiLookAndFeel/.description:
Creates an array,
populates it with UI objects from the passed-in vector,
and returns the array.
